code:
import io
import string
import list

fn digit_val(_ b: Int) -> Int
  b - 48
end

fn flush(_ nums: List<Int>, _ cur: Int, _ neg: Bool) -> List<Int>
  if neg
    list.push(nums, -cur)
  else
    list.push(nums, cur)
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if has
        nums = flush(nums, cur, neg)
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + digit_val(b)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    nums = flush(nums, cur, neg)
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = nums.len()
  while j < m
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let sq = v * v
    if j == 0
      out = "#{sq}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sq}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
